article_title: Issuance of Licenses and Certificates to Manufacturers, Transporters, and Dealers
text: No person may aid and abet a person in the performance of any act in violation of this chapter.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 5. OCCUPATIONAL LICENSING AND BUSINESS REGULATIONS [11100 - 12217]
### Chapter 4. Manufacturers, Transporters, Dealers, and Salesmen [11700 - 11909]
#### Article 1. Issuance of Licenses and Certificates to Manufacturers, Transporters, and Dealers [11700 - 11740]
##### § 11700.3

No person may aid and abet a person in the performance of any act in violation of this chapter.

*(Added by Stats. 2002, Ch. 407, Sec. 1. Effective January 1, 2003.)*

subsections.text: No person may aid and abet a person in the performance of any act in violation of this chapter.

history.raw: (Added by Stats. 2002, Ch. 407, Sec. 1. Effective January 1, 2003.)
